item_0.title: Learn about Hanyang University's central programming club, FORIF.
item_0.description: We welcome all students interested in programming, regardless of their major.

member-signin.title: Member Login
member-signin.description: This is an integrated login for members. Once logged in, you can access more information and services.
member-signin.sign_in_with_hyu_email: Log in with Hanyang University email

info_section.text_0: In accordance with Article 4 (Eligibility and Composition) of Chapter 2 of the club regulations, membership eligibility is limited to enrolled, on-leave, or graduated students of Hanyang University. Therefore, login/sign-up is conducted through Hanyang University email. If you haven't created a Hanyang email yet,

help_section.title: Having difficulty logging in?
help_section.text_1: or check out what other users
help_section.text_4: Contact us via KakaoTalk open channel
help_section.text_5: to assist you in logging into the service.

operator-signin.title: Operator Login
operator-signin.description: This is an integrated login for operators. After logging in, you will be redirected to the operator page.
